name: Rapid Viral Detection Systems
htmlDescription:
InteGen is a diagnostic reagent manufacturing company that has developed disruptive technologies, including innovative DNA probes with clinical applications in cancer genetics, prenatal diagnoses, miscarriages, and IVF.  InteGen’s InstaFish technology provides results of up to 10 targets in a single assay in less than1 hour, using our extremely cost-effective multi-color and multiplex probe design. Our newest product, OncoTierTM can detect all human cancers in less than 2 hours using a non-invasive 3cc peripheral blood sample. It uses powerful screening technology that can detect cancers much earlier and faster than expensive and invasive serum marker and imaging tests (e.g. PSA, CT, and PET scan). OncoTierTM can also monitor cancer treatment efficacy in 100% concordance with clinical remission.  

Rapid Viral Diagnostic Systems (RVDS) is a biotechnology InteGen-affiliated company with a focus on and a track record of developing innovative tools.  It has developed proprietary, clinically validated technologies (Ion Mobility Spectrometry) which allow for the rapid detection (23 seconds) and diagnosis of several infectious and tropical diseases to meet the unmet need for instantaneous point-of-care (POC) testing and diagnosis. The patent-pending tests will revolutionize POC diagnostics by offering a cost effective, noninvasive (saliva based), and highly accurate test without the need for physician administration. Currently RVDS’ rapid test, ViralStatDx TM   can detect malaria, TB, hepatitis, HIV/AIDS, COVID-19, flu and RSV 60 times faster than traditional methods. Research is ongoing to expand the test portfolio to include additional infectious and non-infectious diseases. 

To learn more, visit our Booth: USA Pavilion E-310g

name: RAPIGEN, INC.
htmlDescription:
Rapigen Inc. is a South Korea-based biotechnology company dedicated to advancing global health through innovative diagnostic solutions. Headquartered in Suwon, South Korea, we specialize in the research, development, and manufacturing of high-quality in vitro diagnostics, including rapid diagnostic tests (RDTs) and PCR-related products.

Our product portfolio focuses on addressing critical global health challenges, with solutions for infectious diseases such as malaria, dengue, COVID-19, HIV, and other conditions requiring accurate and timely diagnosis. We are committed to delivering reliable, sensitive, and accessible diagnostic tools that support healthcare providers and improve patient outcomes worldwide.

Recently, our malaria 2nd Gen diagnostic products have achieved WHO Prequalification (WHO PQ), reflecting our commitment to meeting the highest international standards of quality, safety, and performance. This milestone reinforces our position as a trusted partner in global health initiatives and public health programs.

At Rapigen, we believe in bettering humanity through innovation. Our mission is to bridge gaps in healthcare by developing cutting-edge diagnostic technologies that are both effective and accessible, particularly in resource-limited settings. Through continuous research, strategic partnerships, and a strong focus on quality, we strive to make a meaningful impact on global health.

name: Rigenera HBW
htmlDescription: Rigenera HBW was founded in 2013 in Italy, the result of more than a decade of research work. To date, the biotech company develops a technology, unique in its kind, that can provide a rapid and effective method for tissue regeneration by injecting micrograft solution. The Rigenera technology consists of sterile, single-use medical devices called Rigeneracons that can be used in combination with various mechanical activators, such as the Rigenera N4SA machine or the Sicurdrill device, which operate a mechanical disruption that does not affect the cell viability of the tissue (skin, fat, but also cartilage and bone) processed within the device. The Rigeneracons disposable device is a mechanical disruptor of biological tissues, which allow micrografts to be obtained in an autologous, homologous and minimally invasive manner.

Ao longo de nossa trajetória, investimos continuamente no aprimoramento técnico, na excelência dos processos produtivos e na evolução tecnológica, consolidando uma sólida experiência na fabricação de fixadores externos e implantes ortopédicos.

Seguimos rigorosamente as normas e exigências regulatórias do setor, atendendo aos padrões de Boas Práticas de Fabricação (BPF) e mantendo nosso compromisso com a qualidade, segurança e eficácia dos produtos médicos comercializados.

Nossa estrutura industrial está localizada em uma região estratégica, próxima a importantes centros de distribuição, rodovias e aeroportos, garantindo facilidade logística, eficiência no transporte e contribuindo para entregas regulares e pontuais.

Mantendo nosso compromisso com a evolução contínua, a Rufino prevê para 2026 a inauguração de uma nova planta industrial. O projeto vem sendo cuidadosamente planejado e desenvolvido com foco em tecnologia, eficiência e inovação, ampliando significativamente nossa capacidade produtiva e fortalecendo nossa atuação no mercado ortopédico.

Atualmente, seguimos investindo continuamente em tecnologia, qualidade e desenvolvimento de novos projetos, mantendo um sólido plano de crescimento e expansão do nosso portfólio. Permanecemos focados no lançamento de novos produtos e na busca constante por soluções que ofereçam segurança, eficiência e confiança aos profissionais da saúde e pacientes.

name: ZheJiang RouLing Technology Co.,LTD
htmlDescription:
•Neurovista is dedicated to the research of non-invasive brain-computer interface technologies. The company has accumulated a variety of patents and peer-reviewed academic journals papers. It has offices in China, Houston,  USA Singapore, Bahrain etc.

•The team is comprised of leading global talents from renowned institutions such as Harvard, MIT, and Zhejiang University etc, bringing together top material scientists, brain-computer interface engineers, neuroscientists, and senior managements from top tier US hospitals, as well as top notch entrepreneur and experienced manager previously from US and Middle East oil and gas industry. Neurovista's primary R&D effort focuses on flexible electronics EEGs brainwave monitoring and a neural 3D interaction system based on the Metaverse, covering areas like flexible materials, algorithms, AI, and more. The company has successfully raised 100 Million RMB in VC funding and has numerous award such as Forbes, Fortune magazine best design, Hurun and Red Dot etc.

•The company offers technological applications and services for sleep monitoring and sleep modulation with tele-health service, psychiatry disease screening, in-patient and out-patient chronic disease rehabilitation management. The company also offers human computer interaction (HCI) such as intelligent hand gesture recognition for new energy vehicles, VR device interaction, and large-screen interactivity. The vision of the company is to build brain computer interface (BCI) infrastructure and empower businesses, ultimately leading to greater societal impact.

•Right now the company has IP patents and proprietary technology in US, China, India and Saudi Arabia.

name: ZHEJIANG GONGDONG
htmlDescription:
Running a successful business since 1985 Zhejiang Gongdong Medical Technology Co., Ltd. (Zhejiang Gongdong Medical Plastics Factory) was established in 1985 in Huangyan, Taizhou, an economically developed city.

We specialize in the development and production of disposable medical devices, and medical testing supplies. With continuous efforts over the past 30 years, we have become a renowned Chinese enterprise in the field medical consumables and lab supplies, also as a director of the China Association for Medical Devices Industry (CAMDI). Upholding the idea of promoting medical care, we have been making great efforts to continuously provide high-tech, safe, and effective medical products in the industry based on our own strengths and technological innovations. As a frontrunner in China’s medical consumables and lab supplies industry, we offer more than 500 types of products in three major categories.

Since 2001, in order to stay current with the market trends and in pursuit of long-lasting development, we have begun to expand into international medical markets after obtaining ISO international certificate and EC Certificate. Thanks to a strong brand built over the years and diligent efforts paid to expand markets in the past few years, we have made great achievements in international markets, especially in the developed markets such as the United States and Japan where our disposable vaginal speculum and petri dishes are widely recognized by our clients.

Gongdong has established strategic partnerships with the leading health-care companies on the Fortune Global 500 list and developed strong cooperation with globally recognized companies in gene and life sciences through a rigorous validation process, which provides us with the opportunities to tap into the cutting-edge sciences field. In the context of the stable and sustained development of the world economy and Chinese economy, the demand for medical and health care is growing, which drives the development of medical research diagnosis, and consumables industries. Gongdong has sustained the momentum of steady sales growth in recent years and kept leading Chinese medical device and disposable market. Despite the priority given to achievements, we also attach great importance to human resources and thus develop our talent and teams based on an employee-centered approach. Our culture of “high quality, high efficiency, common development, and shared prosperity” has been deeply rooted in our employees�� mind.

We will redouble our efforts to strive for excellence in our technologies and to improve our services. We will also develop products of higher quality to contribute more to improving human health.

name: Weknow Healthtech
htmlDescription:
A Weknow Healthtech é a startup líder do mercado brasileiro em soluções de Analytics e BI para a Saúde. Nós resolvemos grandes problemas de dados e informações para instituições de diversos segmentos desse mercado. (Hospitais, Operadoras de Saúde, Clínicas e Laboratórios).

Possuímos um conjunto de produtos e serviços de Analytics que, através da integração com o ERP e outros sistemas da instituição, geram informações concretas a partir de um grande volume de dados da rotina hospitalar.

Desde a nossa fundação, focamos em entregar soluções que facilitem o trabalho de diretores, coordenadores administrativos, gestão assistencial e médica.

Nos conectamos aos principais softwares de gestão em saúde do Brasil e transformamos dados em informações estratégicas e confiáveis para a tomada de decisão.

Somado a nossa expertise e aos milhares de indicadores pré-desenvolvidos que garantem resultados gerenciais em poucas horas, fornecemos informações necessárias para a alta gestão.

Atualmente, contamos com:

+ de 300 clientes

* 99,06 % de satisfação dos clientes

+ de 520 participantes na comunidade Weknow Brasil no Telegram

Premiações

1º Lugar na Categoria Healhthtech pela 100 Open StartUp e em 2º Lugar no Ranking Geral das TOP100

Estamos entre as 20 healthtechs e scitechs que mais crescem no Brasil nos últimos 5 anos pela Growth Ranking de Healthtechs

2º Lugar - Líder de categoria Bussiness Intelligence e 3º Lugar - Líder de categoria Análise pela B2B Stack

Nosso propósito é tornar a saúde cada vez mais INTELIGENTE, CONECTADA E ACESSÍVEL!

* Mais Inteligência: Facilitar para que a instituição seja guiada a dados, tomando

decisões com fatos e pensamento crítico;

* Mais Conexão: Conectar sistemas, equipes, departamentos, unidades e até

organizações. Integrar através do compartilhamento e comunicação dos dados;

* Mais Acessibilidade: Empoderar as pessoas através dos dados, dando maior

transparência ao passado, controle do presente e visão do futuro.

name: VSI
htmlDescription:
We, VSI Ltd., are an emerging company in Korea, specialized in manufacturing X-ray source along with commercializing X-ray generator using CNT technology the earliest in the world.

With decades of expertise in X-ray generation technology, we specialize in creating compact, lightweight, and high-performance devices that provide exceptional image quality and user convenience in any environment.

name: VivaChek Biotech
htmlDescription:
VivaChek Biotech, founded in Hangzhou, China in August 2013, has evolved into a trusted and rapidly growing manufacturer of Point-of-Care Testing (POCT) products and Blood Glucose Monitoring Systems, boasting partnerships in over 120 countries globally. Our commitment to global healthcare extends to our branch offices, VivaChek Diagnostics in Sacramento, California, USA; VivaChek Life Care in Chennai, India; and VivaChek Polska in Warsaw, Poland.


Today, VivaChek stands as a leading manufacturer of Blood Glucose Monitoring Systems and POCT products. This achievement is a result of meticulous management and collaboration across all departments, harnessing over 30 years of combined leadership and experience in the in vitro diagnostics (IVD) industry. We continually invest in new product development, with our R&D team members each possessing over a decade of experience in POCT product development. They have successfully optimized our existing products and are actively engaged in intelligent and efficient new product development.


Our globally recognized VivaChek™ series Blood Glucose Monitoring Systems have conducted over hundreds of millions of accurate glucose tests worldwide, significantly contributing to healthier lives for individuals with diabetes.


VivaChek introduced the POCT Immunofluorescence Analyzer to the international market in 2018, offering a comprehensive range of rapid tests, including cardiac markers, renal functions, tumor markers, diabetes, infection, and hormone tests. Since 2020, we've focused on developing a variety of SARS-CoV-2 tests, including IgG/IgM antibody, antigen, saliva kits, and PCR tests, to support the global fight against the pandemic.


Our commitment to innovation continues with a robust pipeline, featuring the hemoglobin meter, the lipid profile (TC, TG, HDL, LDL) test system, the 4-in-1 meter for blood ketones, blood glucose, blood lactate and uric acid, an RT-PCR detection system, and numerous other groundbreaking tests. We are dedicated to delivering safe, effective and user-friendly products to customers worldwide, enhancing healthcare accessibility and outcomes for all.

name: VIMAN SISTEMAS
htmlDescription:
Software para Gestão de Importadoras e Distribuidoras de Materiais Cirúrgicos e Hospitalares [ OPME e Correlatos ]

Solicite uma demonstração gratuita: 👉 vimansistemas.com.br

No segmento de importação e distribuição de materiais cirúrgicos (OPME, correlatos e dispositivos médicos implantáveis), a precisão e a rastreabilidade não são apenas diferenciais – são exigências regulatórias. Empresas desse segmento enfrentam desafios diários, como a necessidade de total conformidade com a RDC 665/2022 da ANVISA, o gerenciamento eficiente de estoques de alto valor e a urgência na resposta a demandas do mercado.

É nesse cenário que a VIMAN Sistemas se consolida como uma parceira estratégica. Com 41 anos de trajetória e 26 anos de especialização no setor, desenvolvemos soluções de gestão ERP que não apenas automatizam processos, mas garantem segurança, eficiência e inteligência estratégica para cada etapa da operação – da compra à entrega, da rastreabilidade à auditoria regulatória.

Hoje, a VIMAN Sistemas se consolida como referência nacional, atendendo mais de 1.180 clientes e impulsionando um ambiente favorável para que as empresas sejam mais competitivas. Nossa missão é clara: conectar tecnologia às melhores práticas de gestão, garantindo que cada negócio possa operar com mais eficiência, conformidade e inteligência estratégica.

A VIMAN Sistemas é certificada pela Fundação Vanzolini nas normas ISO 27001:2022 e ISO 27701:2019. Essas certificações são particularmente importantes para nós, pois atuamos no desenvolvimento e implementação de Softwares ERP para segmentos de alta complexidade, incluindo Distribuidoras, Importadoras e Fabricantes do Segmento de Saúde – abrangendo empresas regulamentadas pela ANVISA.

As certificações ISO 27001 e ISO 27701 são normas internacionalmente reconhecidas que estabelecem padrões rigorosos para a gestão da segurança da informação e da privacidade de dados. Essas conquistas refletem nosso compromisso em assegurar a confidencialidade, integridade, disponibilidade e o tratamento adequado dos dados pessoais de nossos clientes, parceiros e usuários finais.

Ao longo de quatro décadas, a VIMAN Sistemas transformou desafios em oportunidades, evoluindo lado a lado com seus clientes. E seguimos firmes nesse propósito: inovar, conectar e potencializar empresas rumo ao futuro da gestão.
